findings.element: More actions button (row action column)
findings.observation: Button renders with hover styles but has no click handler — opens nothing, executes nothing. A broken action in production demos signals incomplete engineering.
findings.suggestion: Implement dropdown with Archive, Delete (with confirmation) or remove the button until ready.
findings.standard_violated: interaction.md — Active and Pressed States; enterprise.md — Professional Appearance

findings.element: Duplicate button (row action column)
findings.observation: Button silently no-ops on click — no handler, no feedback, no error. Broken affordance with no recovery path.
findings.suggestion: Wire to clone-workflow API with optimistic UI update, or remove until implemented.
findings.standard_violated: interaction.md — Active and Pressed States; enterprise.md — Professional Appearance

findings.element: React key prop — WorkflowsPage list render
findings.observation: React.Fragment used in map without a key prop — console error fires on every page load. Indicates an untested render path.
findings.suggestion: Add key={workflow.id} to the Fragment wrapper in the list map.
findings.standard_violated: enterprise.md — Professional Appearance

findings.element: Workflow name form field
findings.observation: Field is missing id and name attributes — browser logs an accessibility warning on every load. Breaks label association and autofill.
findings.suggestion: Add id="workflow-name" and name="workflow-name" to the input element.
findings.standard_violated: accessibility.md — Forms; enterprise.md — Professional Appearance

findings.element: LAST RUN column + execution history drawer
findings.observation: last_run_status is null despite 10 execution records existing. LAST RUN shows '—' for affected rows. All history records show 'paused' status regardless of actual outcome. Backend bug: status is not written back to the workflow record after execution completes.
findings.suggestion: Fix execution completion handler to update last_run_at and last_run_status. Fix execution status enum mapping so completed/failed/running states render correctly.
findings.standard_violated: data-integrity.md — Zero vs Null; enterprise.md — Professional Appearance

findings.element: Stat card counts and filter tabs
findings.observation: Client-side filtering operates on the current page of 25 records only. With 100+ workflows, the DRAFT count will show e.g. 18 instead of the actual 94. Data integrity failure at any real customer scale.
findings.suggestion: Move filter state to URL query params, pass to server. Add server-side aggregate count endpoints for stat cards.
findings.standard_violated: enterprise.md — Scale Behavior; data-integrity.md — Counts and Totals

findings.element: Row-expand toggle buttons (chevron icons)
findings.observation: Expand/collapse buttons have no accessible name — screen readers announce 'button' with no context about which row. Flagged by axe in Lighthouse audit.
findings.suggestion: Add aria-label="Expand {workflow name}" toggling to aria-label="Collapse {workflow name}".
findings.standard_violated: accessibility.md — Button Labels; WCAG 4.1.2 Name, Role, Value

findings.element: Page-level <main> landmark missing
findings.observation: Page has no <main> element — assistive technology users cannot skip to primary content. Lighthouse a11y flags this.
findings.suggestion: Wrap page content area in <main> or add role="main" to the top-level content container.
findings.standard_violated: accessibility.md — Page Structure; WCAG 1.3.6 Identify Purpose

findings.element: All workflows DRAFT — zero published in seed data
findings.observation: Demo dataset contains zero published workflows. '0 Published' stat card renders in green/brand color. Published tab shows empty state with no CTA. Tells an enterprise buyer the platform has never shipped a live automation.
findings.suggestion: Add at least 2 seed workflows in PUBLISHED status. Fix stat card highlight logic so a zero-value published card does not render in success/brand color.
findings.standard_violated: enterprise.md — Professional Appearance; data-integrity.md — Empty States

findings.element: No Run Now / manual trigger from list or editor
findings.observation: There is no way to manually trigger execution of a published workflow from the list page or the editor. RUNS column is display-only. No execution monitoring view exists.
findings.suggestion: Add a Run button to PUBLISHED workflow rows and in more actions. Surface an execution monitoring panel or link to per-workflow execution history.
findings.standard_violated: enterprise.md — Core Workflow Completeness; consistency.md — Action Patterns

findings.element: Stat card row + filter pill row
findings.observation: Both UI components perform identical status filtering on click — redundant controls with no visual distinction between informational and interactive roles.
findings.suggestion: Make stat cards display-only (remove click handler) or remove filter pills. One filter surface is sufficient.
findings.standard_violated: consistency.md — Action Patterns; visual.md — Visual Weight

findings.element: Row click vs. expand chevron — competing interactions
findings.observation: Clicking any part of a table row opens the inline editor panel. Clicking the chevron expands row details. The two interaction targets overlap; users cannot predict which action will fire.
findings.suggestion: Separate intents: row click expands details, explicit Edit button opens inline editor.
findings.standard_violated: interaction.md — Click Targets; consistency.md — Action Patterns

findings.element: Inline editor — right config panel shows placeholder text
findings.observation: Selecting a node in the inline editor highlights it with a green border, but the right panel renders 'Enter Configuration' placeholder instead of the node's properties. State binding between node selection and config panel is broken.
findings.suggestion: Fix the selected-node to config panel data flow. Panel should render appropriate fields for the node type on selection.
findings.standard_violated: data-integrity.md — Empty States; enterprise.md — Professional Appearance

findings.element: Full canvas editor — node config panels empty
findings.observation: In the full /workflows/{id}/edit editor, node config panels render with no labels, no field controls, no explanatory text. No node type has a working configuration form.
findings.suggestion: Implement config form components for each node type: Trigger (schedule/event), Action (patch targets, wave %), Condition (rule builder).
findings.standard_violated: enterprise.md — Professional Appearance; data-integrity.md — Empty States

findings.element: Breadcrumb shows raw UUID in editor
findings.observation: In /workflows/{uuid}/edit, the breadcrumb renders the raw UUID instead of the workflow name. Exposed UUIDs break professional appearance and reveal internal identifiers to clients.
findings.suggestion: Resolve workflow name from the loaded workflow record and render it in the breadcrumb. Also set document.title to match.
findings.standard_violated: enterprise.md — Professional Appearance; consistency.md — Navigation Patterns

findings.element: "Untitled Workflow" in seed / demo data
findings.observation: Default seed contains a workflow with no name, no description, 0 runs, and no last-run date. Placeholder data visible in a demo environment damages credibility.
findings.suggestion: Rename seed workflow with a meaningful name and description. Add name validation: require non-empty name before a workflow can be saved.
findings.standard_violated: enterprise.md — Professional Appearance; data-integrity.md — Empty States

findings.element: Search — no pagination cursor reset
findings.observation: Typing in the search field filters the visible list but does not reset to page 1. Users searching for a workflow on page 3 may get zero results even though the match is on page 1 of the search results.
findings.suggestion: On search input change, reset cursor/page to 0. Move search to server-side via ?q= query param.
findings.standard_violated: data-integrity.md — Counts and Totals; enterprise.md — Scale Behavior

findings.element: Empty filtered / search state — no recovery action
findings.observation: When filtering or searching returns no results, there is no recovery action in the empty state message. User is stuck.
findings.suggestion: Add 'Clear filters' / 'Clear search' button below the empty state copy.
findings.standard_violated: data-integrity.md — Empty States; enterprise.md — Contextual Help

findings.element: Node palette — keyboard inaccessible, no drag affordance
findings.observation: Nodes in the palette are drag-only. No keyboard alternative exists to add a node to the canvas. Palette items show no visual affordance indicating they are draggable.
findings.suggestion: Add keyboard alternative: select node with Enter/Space then click canvas to place. Add cursor:grab and a drag-handle icon to palette items.
findings.standard_violated: accessibility.md — Keyboard Access; WCAG 2.1.1 Keyboard

findings.element: Sidebar nav and section label contrast failures
findings.observation: Sidebar navigation item labels fail WCAG AA contrast: nav labels 4.42:1 (threshold 4.5:1), section group labels 2.68:1, alerts badge 3.76:1.
findings.suggestion: Increase sidebar text color values to achieve ≥4.5:1 for normal text.
findings.standard_violated: accessibility.md — Color Contrast; WCAG 1.4.3 Contrast (Minimum)

findings.element: Stat card label, table header, and row text contrast
findings.observation: Stat card labels 3.97:1, table column headers 4.17:1, row description/timestamp text 3.97:1 — all below WCAG AA 4.5:1 threshold.
findings.suggestion: Darken these text tokens in the design system CSS variables; verify in both light and dark modes.
findings.standard_violated: accessibility.md — Color Contrast; WCAG 1.4.3 Contrast (Minimum)

findings.element: Edit, Duplicate, More actions row buttons lack contextual accessible names
findings.observation: 'Edit' link announces as 'Edit' with no workflow name. 'Duplicate' and 'More actions' buttons have no row identification. Screen reader users cannot distinguish which row an action targets.
findings.suggestion: Add aria-label="Edit {name}", aria-label="Duplicate {name}", aria-label="More actions for {name}" to each button.
findings.standard_violated: accessibility.md — Button Labels; WCAG 4.1.2 Name, Role, Value

findings.element: Filter tabs missing ARIA role and state
findings.observation: Status filter tabs (All, Draft, Published, Archived) have no role="tab", no aria-selected, no role="tablist" container. Keyboard and screen reader navigation is broken.
findings.suggestion: Add role="tablist" to container, role="tab" and aria-selected={isActive} to each tab.
findings.standard_violated: accessibility.md — Interactive Controls; WCAG 4.1.2 Name, Role, Value

findings.element: Search input missing programmatic label
findings.observation: Search field has no <label>, no aria-label, and no aria-labelledby. Screen readers cannot announce what the field is for.
findings.suggestion: Add aria-label="Search workflows" to the input or a visually-hidden <label>.
findings.standard_violated: accessibility.md — Forms; WCAG 1.3.1 Info and Relationships

findings.element: Publish button — no pre-flight guard, no loading state, no error handler
findings.observation: Clicking Publish issues the API call with no validation check, no loading/spinner, and no onError callback. A failed publish silently disappears.
findings.suggestion: Add pre-flight validation before calling publish. Show loading state on button. Show toast on success and on error.
findings.standard_violated: interaction.md — Loading States; data-integrity.md — Error Handling

findings.element: Node config Save button — no commit feedback
findings.observation: After editing a node config and clicking Save, there is no loading indicator, no success toast, and no visual confirmation the save occurred.
findings.suggestion: Add loading state to Save button. Show success toast on completion. Show error toast on failure.
findings.standard_violated: interaction.md — Loading States; enterprise.md — Contextual Help

findings.element: Editor — no unsaved changes warning on navigate away
findings.observation: Navigating away from the editor after making changes gives no confirmation prompt. Changes are silently discarded.
findings.suggestion: Add beforeunload handler and router-level navigation guard showing 'You have unsaved changes — discard?' dialog.
findings.standard_violated: interaction.md — Modals and Dialogs; enterprise.md — Data Safety

findings.element: Execution monitoring view absent
findings.observation: There is no page or panel showing live execution progress, per-node status, logs, or retry controls for a running workflow. The RUNS column is non-interactive.
findings.suggestion: Add execution detail view with per-step status, duration, and log output. Make RUNS column a link.
findings.standard_violated: enterprise.md — Core Workflow Completeness; consistency.md — Navigation Patterns

findings.element: Version history invisible in UI
findings.observation: Workflow version history exists in the data model but is not surfaced in any UI. No version compare, no rollback, no audit trail for workflow changes.
findings.suggestion: Add version history panel in the editor with past saves, diff view, and one-click rollback.
findings.standard_violated: enterprise.md — Audit and Governance; consistency.md — Navigation Patterns

findings.element: Inline canvas parallel-branch layout drops or overlaps nodes
findings.observation: Parallel branches in the inline editor DAG canvas render with node overlap or are dropped entirely due to layout engine constraints.
findings.suggestion: Upgrade inline canvas to elk.js horizontal-rank layout or configure dagre with proper parallel-branch spacing.
findings.standard_violated: enterprise.md — Professional Appearance; data-integrity.md — Visual Accuracy

findings.element: Workflow name input placeholder — typo and incomplete grammar
findings.observation: New workflow name input shows 'Work Flow Name...' (two words, mixed case). Template selector shows 'Build from name...' (grammatically incomplete).
findings.suggestion: Fix to 'Workflow name' and 'Search templates...' respectively.
findings.standard_violated: copy.md — Placeholder Text; enterprise.md — Professional Appearance

findings.element: Topbar search — label contrast failure and label-content-name mismatch
findings.observation: Topbar search has contrast failure on placeholder text and the visible label text does not match the aria-label (WCAG 2.5.3 violation).
findings.suggestion: Align visible label with aria-label. Fix placeholder contrast to ≥4.5:1.
findings.standard_violated: accessibility.md — Color Contrast; WCAG 2.5.3 Label in Name

findings.element: Inline editor no-selection / empty config panel state
findings.observation: When the inline editor panel opens with no node selected, or after selecting a node with no config, the panel shows static placeholder text with no action available.
findings.suggestion: Show useful empty state: 'Select a node to configure it' with icon, or auto-select the first node.
findings.standard_violated: data-integrity.md — Empty States; enterprise.md — Contextual Help

findings.element: Table column headers — ALL-CAPS style
findings.observation: Column headers (NAME, STATUS, NODES, RUNS, LAST RUN, UPDATED) use ALL-CAPS, inconsistent with other pages in the product that use Title Case.
findings.suggestion: Standardize to Title Case across all table headers product-wide.
findings.standard_violated: consistency.md — Typography

findings.element: Node palette — no drag affordance visual cues
findings.observation: Palette items show no cursor change, no drag handle icon, and no tooltip indicating they are draggable onto the canvas.
findings.suggestion: Add cursor:grab, a drag-handle glyph, and a tooltip 'Drag to canvas' on hover.
findings.standard_violated: interaction.md — Affordances; enterprise.md — Contextual Help

findings.element: Filter active — no 'filtered from X total' count indicator
findings.observation: When a filter is active the list shows results but gives no indication of how many records match out of the total.
findings.suggestion: Add 'Showing 12 of 47 workflows' label below the filter row or in the pagination footer.
findings.standard_violated: data-integrity.md — Counts and Totals

findings.element: Pagination footer — no total count
findings.observation: Pagination shows Previous/Next buttons only. No 'Page 2 of 5' or 'Showing 26–50 of 47' indicator.
findings.suggestion: Add total count to pagination footer. Requires server-side count endpoint.
findings.standard_violated: data-integrity.md — Counts and Totals

findings.element: LAST RUN and UPDATED columns — relative timestamps no absolute tooltip
findings.observation: All timestamps shown as relative ('3 days ago') with no tooltip showing the full ISO absolute date. Time context is lost for older records.
findings.suggestion: Add {relativeTime} to all time cells.
findings.standard_violated: data-integrity.md — Dates and Times

findings.element: Table at 768px — action column clipped
findings.observation: At 768px viewport the action column is cut off — only NAME, STATUS, and NODES are fully visible.
findings.suggestion: Implement responsive column priority: hide NODES, RUNS, UPDATED at ≤900px; keep action column always reachable or move to row expand.
findings.standard_violated: enterprise.md — Scale Behavior; visual.md — Alignment

findings.element: Editor at 768px — palette overlaps canvas, non-functional
findings.observation: At 768px the node palette overlaps the canvas making both unusable.
findings.suggestion: Collapse palette to a drawer/bottom-sheet at ≤1024px.
findings.standard_violated: enterprise.md — Scale Behavior; visual.md — Layout

findings.element: outline:none on stat cards and editor name input — keyboard focus invisible
findings.observation: Explicit outline:none on stat card interactive elements and editor name input removes focus ring with no replacement, making keyboard focus invisible.
findings.suggestion: Replace with focus-visible:ring-2 Tailwind utility or equivalent :focus-visible CSS rule.
findings.standard_violated: accessibility.md — Focus Indicators; WCAG 2.4.7 Focus Visible

findings.element: New workflow blank canvas — no onboarding guidance
findings.observation: When creating a new workflow, the canvas shows a single Trigger node on blank space with no instructions, no template shortcuts, no tooltip hints.
findings.suggestion: Add first-use overlay: 'Add your first action — drag from the palette or click +' with a pointer to the palette.
findings.standard_violated: enterprise.md — Contextual Help; enterprise.md — Professional Appearance

findings.element: NODES column raw integer no unit context
findings.observation: NODES column shows a plain integer (e.g. '4') with no unit label or icon indicating what it represents.
findings.suggestion: Change to show '4 nodes' or use a node-count icon badge. Add info tooltip to column header.
findings.standard_violated: data-integrity.md — Counts and Totals

findings.element: RUNS column — no time scope and not clickable
findings.observation: RUNS shows a cumulative integer with no scope (all-time vs. 30-day) and clicking it does nothing.
findings.suggestion: Add '(all time)' sub-label or tooltip. Make RUNS count a link to the workflow's execution history.
findings.standard_violated: data-integrity.md — Counts and Totals; consistency.md — Action Patterns

findings.element: Canvas aria-live="assertive" interrupts screen readers
findings.observation: The DAG canvas uses aria-live="assertive" which interrupts any ongoing screen reader announcement when the canvas updates.
findings.suggestion: Change to aria-live="polite" for non-critical canvas status updates.
findings.standard_violated: accessibility.md — ARIA Live Regions; WCAG 4.1.3 Status Messages

findings.element: Palette search — placeholder as only label
findings.observation: The palette filter input has no <label> — relies solely on placeholder text which disappears on focus and is not read by all screen readers.
findings.suggestion: Add a visually hidden <label> or aria-label="Filter node palette".
findings.standard_violated: accessibility.md — Forms; WCAG 1.3.1 Info and Relationships

findings.element: Icon-only topbar buttons — tooltip not shown on keyboard focus
findings.observation: Icon-only action buttons in the topbar show tooltips on mouse hover but not on keyboard focus.
findings.suggestion: Trigger tooltip on :focus-visible in addition to :hover.
findings.standard_violated: accessibility.md — Focus Indicators; WCAG 2.4.7 Focus Visible

findings.element: Palette search — no clear button
findings.observation: Palette filter input shows no X / clear button once text is entered. User must manually select and delete.
findings.suggestion: Add a clear icon button that appears when the input is non-empty.
findings.standard_violated: interaction.md — Form Controls

findings.element: "Open Editor" vs. "Edit" label inconsistency
findings.observation: Expanded row CTA says 'Open Editor'; row action button says 'Edit'; both navigate to the same URL.
findings.suggestion: Standardize to 'Edit' everywhere (shorter, consistent with product-wide conventions).
findings.standard_violated: consistency.md — Terminology

findings.element: Archived tab — "0" count badge shown when empty
findings.observation: Archived tab renders a '0' badge, which is visual noise when there are no archived workflows.
findings.suggestion: Suppress the badge when count is 0.
findings.standard_violated: visual.md — Visual Noise

findings.element: Zap icon used for node count column
findings.observation: NODES column uses a zap/lightning bolt icon which implies execution speed, not node count.
findings.suggestion: Use a graph/node icon (e.g. GitFork, Network) for the node count indicator.
findings.standard_violated: consistency.md — Icon Usage

findings.element: Topbar breadcrumb contrast 4.42:1 — marginally below threshold
findings.observation: Topbar breadcrumb text renders at 4.42:1 contrast, just below the WCAG AA 4.5:1 threshold.
findings.suggestion: Increase breadcrumb text color by 1–2 shades to reach ≥4.5:1.
findings.standard_violated: accessibility.md — Color Contrast; WCAG 1.4.3 Contrast (Minimum)

findings.element: Expanded row relative time truncated — '46 ago'
findings.observation: Expanded row timestamp renders as '46 ago' with the unit word missing or truncated.
findings.suggestion: Fix timeAgo formatter to always include the unit: '46 minutes ago'. Handle future timestamps gracefully.
findings.standard_violated: data-integrity.md — Dates and Times

delta.trend_note: No fixes applied between same-day reviews. Expanding from 1 to 8 perspectives revealed 32 additional findings. Accessibility a11y score improved from 87 to 89.
